summary: Keep sync cursors, local fallbacks, timeline filters, nearby enrichment, and learning tokens source-honest under partial failures.
reason: Rejected records, unreproducible filters, unparsed dates, one failed detail fetch, and asymmetric punctuation tokenization could silently hide or broaden evidence.
validated_outcome: Regression tests cover unparsed timeline evidence and symmetric hyphen/underscore recall tokens; the full Go suite and live EPA matrix pass.
